description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a compact profile. It is equipped with a prominent optical sight mounted on the top rail, likely for enhanced targeting accuracy. The body appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with polymer components for the grip and possibly the stock. The barrel is slim and extends forward, with no visible muzzle device attached. The magazine is not clearly visible, suggesting it may be internal or not currently attached. The overall build suggests a lightweight, maneuverable firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with an optical sight and a slim barrel, designed for maneuverability and precision.
description_view_0: The left side of the rifle is mostly obscured, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: The right side view reveals the optical sight mounted on the top rail and the slim profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: The front view shows the barrel's end and the alignment of the optical sight, emphasizing the rifle's narrow width.
description_view_3: The rear view is almost entirely dark, with no discernible features visible.
